scripts.build: node ./build/update-path.js && npm run update:version && npm run pack && webpack --mode production --config ./build/node-extension.webpack.config.js
scripts.build:ci: node ./build/update-path.js ci && npm run update:version && npm run pack  --platform=ci && webpack --mode production --config ./build/node-ci.webpack.config.js
scripts.build:vsix: npm run build && cd wasm-code-split && npx vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --allow-star-activation --skip-license -o ../wasm-code-split.vsix
scripts.dev: node ./build/update-path.js && npm run pack && webpack --mode development --watch --config ./build/node-extension.webpack.config.js
scripts.dev:ci: node ./build/update-path.js ci && npm run pack --platform=ci && webpack --mode development --watch --config ./build/node-ci.webpack.config.js
scripts.pretest: npm run test-compile && npm run lint
